name: ambient-faster-whisper-stt
description: Adapter-only local faster-whisper speech-to-text provider for Ambient STT product-path validation.

env.name: AMBIENT_FASTER_WHISPER_MODEL
env.description: Optional faster-whisper model id. Defaults to tiny.en for the small local control path.

env.name: AMBIENT_FASTER_WHISPER_DEVICE
env.description: Optional faster-whisper device. Defaults to cpu.

env.name: AMBIENT_FASTER_WHISPER_COMPUTE_TYPE
env.description: Optional faster-whisper compute type. Defaults to int8.

env.name: AMBIENT_FASTER_WHISPER_UV
env.description: Optional uv command or absolute path. Defaults to uv on PATH.

env.name: AMBIENT_FASTER_WHISPER_VERSION
env.description: Optional faster-whisper package version. Defaults to 1.1.1.

env.name: AMBIENT_FASTER_WHISPER_PYTHON
env.description: Optional uv Python version. Defaults to 3.12.

faster_whisper_transcribe.description: Transcribe a normalized WAV utterance to Ambient STT JSON using faster-whisper tiny.en.
